resources.string: Import SMC Electric Gripper Control Library
This feature is not available in the current version of Epson RC+. Please update to the latest version before using it.
The import of the SMC electric gripper control library has been completed.
Failed to extract the SMC electric gripper control library to the Libraries folder. Please check the available disk space and write permissions for the Libraries folder.

The project containing the SMC electric gripper control library is not open. After running "Import SMC electric gripper control library", confirm that "SMC_LEHR.lib" has been added to the project, and then run again.
Failed to connect to the controller. Please connect to the controller and try again.
Failed to connect to the gripper. Please check that the gripper is powered on and the wiring is correct.
Failed to back up the motion settings to the '{0}' file.
Failed to load the motion settings from the '{0}' file. The file may be corrupted.

The controller's background task is disabled. If you continue connecting, you will be able to operate the gripper, but robot jog operations will not be available.
Do you want to continue the connection?
Failed to add the SMC electric gripper control library to the project. If the maximum number of libraries has been reached, remove unnecessary libraries and try again.
